rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the same real naming concern (mapValue / mapValue_* in the Bialgebra section and module docstring, which lacks Mathlib precedent among map*/comp* families and is only loosely tied to functor-of-points prose); acting on either produces an essentially identical outcome (rename to one of several defensible alternatives like compRight/postcomp). No other findings exist, so the merged PRs are equivalent.
